title: Rajasthan University Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Rajasthan University Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Rajasthan University Result 2026 declared for 1st Semester BA LLB Hons Integrated Course Revaluation on the official website - uniraj.ac.in on 22 May 2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Rajasthan University result.

content.text: Rajasthan University Result 2026 has been officially released for B.A. LL.B. (Hons) 1st Semester Five Year Integrated Course Revaluation Examination December 2025. Students who applied for revaluation of their BA LLB Hons 1st Sem papers can now check their updated results online through the Uniraj result portal.

Rajasthan University Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - uniraj.ac.in, and is accessible through the dedicated result portal result.uniraj.ac.in. Students need to open the BA LLB Hons I Sem revaluation result link and enter the required exam details such as roll number to view their revised marks.

After downloading the online marksheet, candidates are advised to carefully verify their name, roll number, subject-wise marks, and result status. In case of any discrepancy in the Rajasthan University BA LLB Hons revaluation result, students should immediately contact the university examination authorities using the official contact channels provided on the site.

Rajasthan University has updated the Uniraj result portal with the latest BA LLB Hons 1st Semester revaluation result for the Dec 2025 examination session. Students can now check their revised scores and download the online marksheet directly from result.uniraj.ac.in using their roll number. The result has been declared in online mode only for quicker access and transparency for law students.

rows: B.A. LL.B. (Hons) I Sem Five Year Integrated Course Revaluation Exam Dec 2025

content.text: Rajasthan University has activated the online link to check BA LLB Hons 1st Semester Revaluation Result 2026 on the official Uniraj result website. Law students can view or download their revised marks instantly by opening the revaluation result page and entering their roll number as per the exam form. The direct link below will take candidates to the BA LLB Hons I Sem integrated course revaluation result page on result.uniraj.ac.in.

links.label: B.A. LL.B. (Hons) I Sem Five Year Integrated Course Exam Dec 2025 Revaluation Result

sections.heading: How to Download Rajasthan University Result 2026

content.text: Follow the steps below to check and download the Rajasthan University BA LLB Hons 1st Sem Revaluation Result 2026 online:

items: Visit the official Rajasthan University result website at result.uniraj.ac.in or go to uniraj.ac.in and open the Result section.
On the Uniraj result page, find the link for "B.A. LL.B. (Hons) I Sem (Five Year) Integrated Course Exam Dec 2025 (Reval.)".
Click on the relevant result link to open the BA LLB Hons revaluation result page.
Enter your roll number and any other details asked on the screen.
Click on the "Find" or "Submit" button to view your Rajasthan University BA LLB Hons 1st Sem revaluation result 2026.
Check your subject-wise revised marks, total marks, and result status.
Download or print the online marksheet for future reference and for use until the original updated marksheet is issued by the university.

structured_links.label: B.A. LL.B. (Hons) I Sem Five Year Integrated Course Exam Dec 2025 Revaluation Result
